narrative:
Maximiliano Araújo is an impressive Left-Back with an overall rating of 7.35/10. This places him in the top 1% of left-backs at this tournament, reflecting his strong performances. His rating draws 58% from club form over the last two seasons and 42% from his contributions at this World Cup.

Araújo demonstrates significant attacking threat, evidenced by his 0.714 goals per 90 min and 0.357 assists per 90 min at this World Cup. He also averages 3.571 key passes per 90 min, underscoring his creative influence. Conversely, his 0.714 tackles per 90 min and 0.357 clearances per 90 min indicate a more forward-thinking role.

Araújo clearly functions as a highly offensive full-back for his national team, heavily involved in goal creation. Scouts should closely monitor his consistent attacking output, particularly his expected goals and assists which are strong at both club and World Cup levels. His overall impact in both phases of play will be crucial in the remaining matches.
